Localization.Description: A user changed a critical user account in Zabbix. This could be an attacker's attempt to escalate privileges or make system and network resources unavailable.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} deleted critical user account {object.account.name} in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed critical user account {object.account.name} in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
